parents.subject: LU-13057 tests: sanity-pcc test_1c: Failed to start copytool

commit.subject: ATM-1283 tests: run Lustre security tests
commit.message:
ATM-1283 tests: run Lustre security tests

We want to create a test group that runs Lustre security
tests.
The objective is to be able to pass:
- sanity,recovery-small,sanity-selinux with SELinux enabled
- sanity,recovery-small,sanity-sec with SSK enabled
- sanity,recovery-small,sanity-selinux,sanity-sec with both SSK and
  SELinux enabled

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-ssk
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-ssk
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-ssk
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk

Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I742db897ead702aa6c240b59b6de40e43e54215a
